creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Problem persists after 486195.

All ports except py27-reportlab are up to date as of this morning. System is 11.2-Stable r338990. Nothing in make.conf except DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=linux=c7_64.

src.conf has:
WITHOUT_ATM=true
WITHOUT_FLOPPY=true
WITHOUT_GPIB=YES
WITHOUT_I4B==YES
WITHOUT_IPFILTER=true
WITHOUT_LPR=true
WITHOUT_NCP=YES
WITHOUT_PF=YES
WITHOUT_PPP=true
WITHOUT_PROFILE=YES
WITHOUT_SENDMAIL=true
